name: openclaw-chinese-laoshi
description: Normalize Chinese transcript assets, build teaching docs, and run pilot-first tutor workflows with strict publication review gates.

interface.shortDescription: Normalize Chinese transcripts, build tutor artifacts, and block bad publishes with scoped review gates
interface.longDescription: Use OpenClaw Chinese Laoshi to turn transcript and subtitle drops into grounded raw transcripts, lesson JSON, learner-facing Markdown, local export bundles, and publication-safe public bundles for GitHub and ClawHub. The published skill avoids public API-key lanes and treats video-only extraction as a private source-repo workflow.
defaultPrompt: Extract lesson 01 into raw transcript, lesson JSON, and learner Markdown.
Review this course bundle for leaks, slop, and publish blockers.
Prepare local Drive-ready exports and study modes for the next approved lesson.
